Container.Name: ChoreQuest
Container.Overview: Mobile-first family chores & rewards app. Parents create chores with financial or custom rewards and approve completions; children log in to see their chores, mark them done, and track rewards earned per month. Self-contained Node/Express + SQLite, served on a single port.
Container.Description: Mobile-first family chores & rewards app (Node/Express + SQLite). First run seeds a parent account (login "parent" / password "password123", printed in the container log) — change it on the app's Account page or set the Initial Parent Password below. IMPORTANT: the database is SQLite in WAL mode, so point App Data at a cache-backed appdata share (or a /mnt/cache/... path); SQLite on a multi-disk /mnt/user FUSE path or a network share can corrupt. Your data persists in the App Data path across image updates.

Config.Name: WebUI Port
Config.Description: Host port for the web UI. The container always listens on 3001.

Config.Name: App Data
Config.Description: Persistent SQLite database (and the generated JWT secret). Use a cache-backed appdata share or a /mnt/cache/... path — avoid multi-disk /mnt/user FUSE or network shares for SQLite/WAL. Survives image updates.

Config.Name: Initial Parent Password
Config.Description: Password for the seeded 'parent' account, used on FIRST run only. Leave blank to use the default 'password123' (then change it in-app).

Config.Name: JWT Secret
Config.Description: Optional. Token signing secret. Leave blank to auto-generate and persist one in the App Data path. Set explicitly only for multi-instance deployments.

Config.Name: Secure Cookie (HTTPS)
Config.Description: Set to true when serving over HTTPS (e.g. behind a reverse proxy) so the auth cookie is only sent over HTTPS.
